selection_evidence: Game is a match-3 puzzle: grid cells, tile occupancy, legal move preview — board_grid maps directly
Character animations are DragonBones staged in screen-space slots beside the board (visual_novel secondary mode)
No scrolling, no locomotion, fixed camera: board_grid with screen_stack depth model confirmed
art-pipeline-config.json dimension=2d, engine=cocos-creator, platform=web-canvas-2d — fully compatible

compatibility_checks.note: No locomotion required; tile swap is UI gesture, not movement
Board shapes (rectangle 8x8/9x9, irregular island) fully compatible with board_grid
Static PNG tiles, JPG backgrounds, DragonBones characters — all board_grid compatible
Cocos Creator 3.x web-canvas-2d supports board_grid with parallax layers and DragonBones
Front-facing bust/full-body, mirror_x for left/right slots
Cocos Creator 3.x, web-canvas-2d, per-chapter atlases, JPG backgrounds, PNG tiles
